finding_results.notes: Kept the walk back continuous by preserving the 9:15 watch check and changing the stairwell beat so midnight is no longer implied during the same return route.
finding_results.summary: The sub-collection exit, corridor descent, stairwell, and common-room arrival now read as one uninterrupted same-evening walk.

finding_results.notes: Turned the coda from recap into consequence: Gavin presses Ffion to repeat the charm because the Builders revelation has changed what he sees, unnerves her by failing to explain himself, then tries and fails to write the discovery in a form he could share with Miren or Babbling.
finding_results.summary: The Builders revelation now alters Gavin's behavior on the page and ends in a failed attempt to translate cosmology into human language.
